lines.text: It's all thanks to you that I could have reached the ultimate Magnetic Cube Mechanics.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: When that was discovered, all my pain was gone and all my worries fade away. I was so relieved it felt like I'm no longer sick. Thank you so much!
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: Oh yes, I should thank Qingshu. If it weren't her who was always updating the puzzles and trying to stop me from entering the pit, I wouldn't have studied it so hard and progressed so dramatically.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III
The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: What, what should I see? Oh!
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: Yes... Got to thank Miss Qingshu.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: I've been in my head too much and thinking about Magnetic Cube Mechanics. My messing around has caused Miss Qingshu and {PlayerName} trouble.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: Now that I have developed such great Magnetic Cube Mechanics, I should stay put and refrain from causing trouble.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: I have saved some money privately, originally for the purpose of Magnetic Cube Mechanics studying, but now that {PlayerName} has helped me find the ultimate Magnetic Cube Mechanics, you should have the money.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: That's the treasure I talked about. I'll send you the coordinates. Don't forget to collect it.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: And Miss Qingshu... What would you like? I don't know your favorites yet.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III
The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III

lines.text: Then, I'll make up for it when we work together later.
lines.quest_name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III
